name: Slopshop
description: API platform with 1,152 real tools across 258 endpoints. Every tool actually works - no mocks, no stubs.

categories.name: Text Processing
categories.description: Extract, transform, analyze, and manipulate text. Every API actually processes your input.

categories.name: Data Transform
categories.description: JSON, CSV, XML, YAML conversions, flattening, merging, diffing, and schema generation.

categories.name: Crypto & Security
categories.description: Hashing, encryption, JWT, passwords, UUIDs, TOTP, and random generation.

categories.name: Math & Numbers
categories.description: Evaluate expressions, statistics, finance, unit conversion, and number formatting.

categories.name: Date & Time
categories.description: Parse, format, diff, add, business days, cron, holidays, and timezone conversion.

categories.name: Code Utilities
categories.description: JSON-to-TypeScript, SQL formatting, regex explain, semver, OpenAPI validation, and more.

categories.name: Generate
categories.description: Fake data, SVG avatars, QR codes, color palettes, short IDs, and lorem ipsum.

categories.name: Network & DNS
categories.description: DNS lookups, HTTP status checks, SSL verification, email validation, and CIDR operations.

categories.name: AI: Content
categories.description: Blog posts, landing pages, email drafts, social posts, ad copy via real LLM calls.

categories.name: AI: Analysis
categories.description: Summarize, classify, extract entities, sentiment, translate. Real LLM analysis of your text.

categories.name: AI: Code
categories.description: Generate code, review, test, document, convert. LLM-powered dev tools.

categories.name: AI: Business
categories.description: Meeting prep, proposals, job descriptions, contract analysis. LLM-powered business tools.

categories.name: Agent Tools
categories.description: JSON extraction/validation, webhooks, teams, prediction markets, governance, identity, knowledge graph, forms, tickets.

categories.name: Analyze
categories.description: A/B testing, funnel analysis, time series, cohort retention, distribution fitting, CSV correlation.

categories.name: Memory
categories.description: Persistent key-value, queues, counters, namespaces, vector search. FREE - 0 credits.

categories.name: Sense: Web
categories.description: Fetch URL content, detect tech stacks, measure response time, extract links/meta, RSS feeds.

categories.name: Execute
categories.description: Sandboxed JavaScript, Python, jq, JSONPath, Handlebars/Mustache templates, SQL on JSON.

categories.name: Orchestrate
categories.description: Delay, retry, parallel, race, timeout, caching, rate limiting, locks, circuit breakers, scheduling.

categories.name: Communicate
categories.description: Webhook inbox, short URLs, QR codes, email/phone validation, iCal, vCard, RSS, OPML, sitemap.

categories.name: Enrich
categories.description: Domain-to-company, email-to-name, IP-to-ASN, MIME types, HTTP status explain, user-agent parse.

categories.name: Generate: Doc
categories.description: Markdown tables, CHANGELOG, README, API docs, docker-compose, GitHub Actions, configs.

categories.name: Copilot
categories.description: Run a second AI agent alongside the main agent in the same terminal. Spawn, chat, push results, scale to N copilots.

categories.name: Compute Exchange
categories.description: Peer-to-peer compute marketplace. Earn credits by contributing idle compute, submit tasks to the network, track earnings.

categories.name: Validation
categories.description: Email, URL, phone, credit card, date, IP, UUID, domain, color, JSON, semver, IBAN, ISBN validation. Pure compute.

categories.name: API Testing
categories.description: Mock responses, request building, curl generation, rate limit simulation, latency testing, error simulation, health checks.

categories.name: HTTP Utilities
categories.description: Header parsing, querystring building, cookie parsing, content-type detection, basic/bearer auth, URL manipulation.

categories.name: Auth & Security
categories.description: API key generation, OAuth token building, scope validation, RBAC checking, password strength, security headers.

categories.name: Developer Tools
categories.description: UUID inspection, timestamp debugging, env file parsing, dependency checking, changelog generation, config validation.

categories.name: Finance
categories.description: Compound interest, loan payment, ROI, mortgage amortization, tax estimation, currency conversion.

categories.name: Media Utilities
categories.description: Image metadata, audio properties, video info, file type detection, MIME handling.

categories.name: Geolocation
categories.description: IP geolocation, coordinate distance, timezone from coordinates, address parsing, country lookup.

categories.name: Communication
categories.description: Email templates, SMS templates, notification formatting, message scheduling.

categories.name: Structured Output
categories.description: Schema validation (JSON Schema draft-07), JSON repair for broken LLM output, structured data extraction.

categories.name: RAG Primitives

categories.name: Code Analysis
categories.description: AST-level code parsing, cyclomatic and cognitive complexity scoring, dead code detection, import graph analysis.

categories.name: Observability
